name: Bubble Sort
description: Implement the bubble sort algorithm. Repeatedly step through the array, compare adjacent elements, and swap them if they are in the wrong order. The pass through the array is repeated until the array is sorted. Optimize by stopping early if no swaps occur in a pass. Time: O(n^2), Space: O(1).
